intent: The shipped bootstrap control block (-D / -b 8192 / --backlog_wait_time 60000 / -f 1) that every Rocky VM ships in /etc/audit/rules.d/audit.rules. Exercises the control-rule classification and the near-zero cost boundary.
suspected_trap: A naive impl might mis-tier control flags as syscall rules, or divide-by-zero / emit NaN on a zero-event ruleset. The correct result is a sane ~$0/month at every band. -b 8192 carrying a numeric arg must not be misread as a volume signal.
